title: Flex (FLEX) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Despite a robust demand environment with continued strength in the Agility Solutions and Reliability Solutions segments, logistics woes from the pandemic dampen Flex's (FLEX) Q3 top line.

title: Flex Ltd (FLEX) CEO Revathi Advaithi on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Flex Ltd (FLEX) CEO Revathi Advaithi on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Flex (FLEX) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 21.95% and 4.88%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Flex Announces Date for Third Quarter Fiscal 2022 Earnings Call
text: SAN JOSE, Calif., Jan. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) will announce its third quarter fiscal year 2022 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, January 26, 2022.
